# Software.com

> Software.com automates data to measure and benchmark critical areas of investment in software development and R\&D. Get actionable, quantitative insights to unlock developer productivity and accelerate innovation.

Key Benefits:

- Accelerate AI adoption by identifying which GenAI tools and initiatives are driving the biggest productivity improvements  
- Remove engineering bottlenecks with actionable data to help teams identify and unblock their top constraints  
- Improve developer experience by surfacing insights on hidden productivity drains, like high rework and failing deployments

Features: 

- Fully automated KPIs that work across teams without requiring extra configuration or changes to your development process  
- Bottleneck analysis that uncovers high-impact areas, making it easy for every team to take action without being buried in dashboards or data  
- Metrics engine that monitors and detects new opportunities, helping you continuously improve productivity  
- Fast, easy setup (just connect a Git provider) and a two-week free trial  
- Support for major Git providers, including GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, and Azure DevOps

## Platform

- [Overview](https://www.software.com/product): Overview of the Software.com platform, detailing its capabilities in automating data for software development and R\&D  
- [Integrations](https://www.software.com/integrations): Catalog of supported integrations for automating engineering metrics  
- [Security](https://www.software.com/security): Hub for security-related information, including SOC 2 compliance and protocols in place to protect user data

## How to Get Started

- [Sign up](https://app.software.com/signup): Sign up to try out the product today  
- [Get a demo](https://www.software.com/demo): Contact the team for a demo  
- [Pricing](https://www.software.com/pricing): Overview of pricing plans, from self-serve to custom enterprise plans

## Research and Insights

- [Software Development KPIs](https://www.software.com/guides/how-to-measure-software-development-performance): Guide to the metrics that every engineering leader should measure  
- [Future of Work\](https://www.software.com/reports/future-of-work): Data on the impact of remote work on software development  
- [Code Time Report\](https://www.software.com/reports/code-time-report): Data on engineering friction, productivity, and flow from 250K+ developers  
- [Blog](https://www.software.com/src): Content on developer productivity, engineering data, and product announcements

## Code Time

- [Overview](https://www.software.com/product/code-time): Learn how to stay in flow and decrease interrupts with Code Time  
- [Supported code editors and IDEs](https://www.software.com/code-editors): Choose from 20+ integrations and install Code Time everywhere you code

## Company

- [About](https://www.software.com/about): Information about Software.com, our mission, and the team behind the platform  
- [News](https://www.software.com/news): Updates and announcements about Software.com
